heading: Requirement that accreditation organizations adopt accreditation standards
label: 30308 Requirement that accreditation organizations adopt accreditation standards
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15608 of Title 42

children.heading: Eligibility for Federal grants
children.label: a Eligibility for Federal grants
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, an organization responsible for the accreditation of Federal, State, local, or private prisons, jails, or other penal facilities may not receive any new Federal grants during any period in which such organization fails to meet any of the requirements of subsection (b).

At all times after 90 days after , the organization shall have in effect, for each facility that it is responsible for accrediting, accreditation standards for the detection, prevention, reduction, and punishment of prison rape.September 4, 2003

At all times after 1 year after the date of the adoption of the final rule under , the organization shall, in addition to any other such standards that it may promulgate relevant to the detection, prevention, reduction, and punishment of prison rape, adopt accreditation standards consistent with the national standards adopted pursuant to such final rule.section 30307(a)(4) of this title
